breakdown: This PR adds tests for process_action debug_info precedence preservation and validates narrative fallback structure through AST inspection. Testing focuses on stream failure classification, empty payload handling, and MCP retries. However, the diff appears truncated showing only test changes without core implementation logic, making it difficult to fully assess error handling, type safety, architecture patterns, and documentation quality across the full codebase.
